measurementLimits: Sprite rows intentionally include both a docs/catalog proxy and a live runtime-canvas score; they answer different questions and should not be collapsed.

The promoted-target-crop runtime row is a first-pass static image-grid comparison against exact source-sheet crops; it is deliberately stricter and currently exposes a larger visual gap than the inferred-model runtime score.

Sprite conformance is not complete until temporal behavior is measured. Current sprite scores isolate static poses; animation phases, flapping cadence, pulsing, rotations, dive poses, capture/rescue transitions, and formation context still need their own windows.
Fonts are measured through text containment and text-heavy visual surface scoring; arcade font identity still needs dedicated pixel targets.
Background and shell scores use the first-pass visual scorer plus release gates; direct Galaga contact-sheet metrics are the next fidelity step.

rows.surface: Sprites: docs catalog proxy vs inferred Galaga pixel models
rows.status: Measured proxy; keep alongside live runtime canvas score
rows.measurement: 8 catalog keys compared; model confidence 94% from 21 accepted source samples; weakest current proxy challenge-dragonfly 5.5/10.
rows.next: Use this as the cheap warning metric when docs/current definitions drift from the target model; the runtime canvas metric is the player-visible read.

rows.surface: Sprites: live runtime canvas capture vs inferred Galaga pixel models
rows.status: Measured from isolated live canvas crops
rows.measurement: 8 live sprite captures; weakest runtime sprite but-line 4.8/10; capture mode isolated-live-canvas-sprite-crops.
rows.next: Expand from static isolated poses into animation-phase, dive-rotation, formation-context, and capture/rescue runtime sprite windows.

rows.surface: Sprites: live runtime crops vs promoted Galaga target crops
rows.target: >=8.5/10 against promoted multi-pose target crop library
rows.measurement: 8 live runtime crop PNGs compared against 33 promoted target crops; weakest bee-line 3.4/10; best matched target bee-zako-flap-a. Target-relative cadence sequence score 5.2/10 across 3 sequence window(s).
rows.next: Use the top candidate mismatch and target-sequence data to update sprite geometry, flap cadence, target mappings, and composite targets; then expand to dive, capture/rescue, projectile, explosion, tractor beam, and challenge-stage specialty motion.

rows.surface: Sprite motion: flapping, pulsing, dive poses, and transition animation
rows.target: Temporal sprite score across flap cadence, pulse/damage phases, dive rotation, and capture/rescue transitions
rows.status: First temporal phase windows captured; full motion score still pending
rows.measurement: Static live-canvas pose score exists at 5.8/10; 4/4 planned motion axes have at least seed coverage. Covered: two-phase flap/pulse static sprite delta for bee, butterfly, and boss families; full flap-cycle cadence windows for bee, butterfly, and boss families; forced dive/rotation pose silhouettes for bee, butterfly, and boss families; capture-beam, carried-fighter, and dual-fighter transition seed poses. Full roadmap: flap-cycle cadence and alternating wing/body pixels over full temporal windows; pulse and damage-state brightness/color phases; dive/rotation pose silhouettes; capture, carried-fighter, rescue, and dual-fighter transition poses.
rows.next: Add harness windows for flap cycle A/B frames, pulse and damage-state timing, dive-rotation silhouettes, and carried/rescue/dual-fighter transition frames before treating sprite conformance as visually complete.

rows.target: >=7.5/10 static event crop score plus temporal lifecycle scoring
rows.measurement: 4 runtime impact/explosion crops compared against promoted target explosion crops; weakest boss-first-hit 5.6/10; lifecycle 3.8/10; audio coupling 8.1/10. Impact/explosion visual feedback is measurable but still immature. Weakest static event is boss-first-hit at 5.6/10; weakest lifecycle event is boss-first-hit at 3.67/10. The scorer now checks onset/expansion/decay and expected audio cue presence.
rows.next: Replace first-pass lifecycle heuristics with exact frame-labeled Galaga gameplay timing, then use visual/audio coupling to decide whether boss first-hit, normal kill, and boss death read distinctly enough to players.

rows.surface: Reference sprite targets: source-frame pixel library
rows.current: 8 catalog keys covered by 6 exact crops
rows.target: All live ship/enemy catalog keys covered by source-frame targets
rows.measurement: 6 unscaled PNG crops cover bee-line, boss-line, but-line, challenge-dragonfly, challenge-mosquito, dual-fighter, player-fighter, rogue-fighter; target dimensions are verified against crop metadata.
rows.next: Add additional formation, animation-phase, and damage-state crops so target references cover more than the static catalog poses.

rows.surface: Reference sprite targets: promoted sheet pose crops
rows.target: Multi-pose target sets for player, bee, butterfly, boss, challenge aliens, projectiles, explosions, and tractor beam
rows.measurement: 33 exact 1x source-sheet crops; roles bee-zako, boss-galaga, butterfly-escort, challenge-specialty-aliens, player-fighter, projectiles-and-impacts, tractor-beam; source-pixel exact pending.
rows.next: Regenerate Aurora live runtime comparisons against the corrected Boss, Bee, and Butterfly targets, then promote clean player-fighter and temporal pulse/cadence targets before tuning more runtime sprites.

rows.surface: Audio cues: runtime cue assets vs Galaga-family references
rows.measurement: 21 cue/event comparisons, 31 segment-role comparisons, semantic score 9.8/10, highest risk challengePerfect 7/10.
rows.next: Tune the highest segment-level gap next: challengePerfect onset. Rerun audio comparison and event-gap analysis after the change.

rows.target: All event-alignment checks pass with low drift
rows.measurement: Worst current delta 6.31 ms; worst drift from baseline 0 ms.
rows.next: Keep event alignment coupled to the cue-contract promotion pass so timing does not regress while changing source clips.

rows.status: New explicit gate; first-pass scorer measured
rows.measurement: 4 browser surfaces measured; evidence coverage 1; frame containment average 1; weakest surface Developer/settings popup surface 7.1/10.
rows.next: Add direct Galaga contact-sheet targets for background density, starfield cadence, palette spread, and attract/gameplay contrast.

rows.surface: Frame, popups, shell controls, and icons
rows.status: Split from generic UI shell before final gate
rows.measurement: 12 surface guardrails in latest quality report; visual scorer weakest shell surface Developer/settings popup surface 7.1/10.
rows.next: Split iconography, dock-button affordance, and popup typography into separate target rows once we have icon/font-specific captures.

rows.target: >=8.4/10 visual gate; font-authenticity target still pending
rows.status: Measured as layout/text containment, not yet arcade font identity
rows.measurement: 4 overflow markers across 4 surfaces; weakest text-heavy surface Developer/settings popup surface at 7.1/10.
rows.next: Add pixel-font targets for score labels, score-table labels, popup headings, and HUD numerals so font authenticity gets its own score.

rows.surface: Stage backgrounds, level arc, and encounter shape
rows.measurement: Release gate tracks stage distinctiveness, challenge identity, pressure curve, reward/rescue layering, and learning/mastery windows.
rows.next: Tie visual background/theme transitions to the level-arc windows so stage identity scores include both motion and look.

rows.surface: Bosses, formation grammar, and alien entry choreography
rows.status: New measured gate for stage choreography
rows.measurement: Companion novelty gate 8.2/10 for broader alien entry/challenge variety.
rows.next: Continue frame-labeled path references so boss and alien choreography can be judged against exact source trajectories.
